name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability or improvement

labels: enhancement

---

## Problem

What are you trying to do, and where does the app fall short today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. Sketches or examples welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you set them aside.

## Additional context

Anything else — does this affect riders, curators, or community maintainers?
